checkitem.compliant: ( name = 'VERSION' and lpad(SUBSTRING(VALUE, LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1, (IFNULL(NULLIF(LOCATE(VALUE, '.', LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1), 0), LENGTH(VALUE)+1) - LOCATE(VALUE, '.') - 1)), 3, '0') >= '146' )
checkitem.noncompliant: ( name = 'VERSION' and lpad(SUBSTRING(VALUE, LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1, (IFNULL(NULLIF(LOCATE(VALUE, '.', LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1), 0), LENGTH(VALUE)+1) - LOCATE(VALUE, '.') - 1)), 3, '0') < '038' )
